Stevenson_Rhamondre.name: Rhamondre Stevenson
strengths: Consistent volume as Drake Maye's outlet
Stevenson_Rhamondre.analysis: Stevenson profiles as a high-floor RB2 with upside. New England's commitment to a ground game supporting Drake Maye's development should keep his carries high. The receiving role is the differentiator in PPR — he's a legitimate pass-game weapon out of the backfield. Target 225+ carries and 55+ targets for another 200+ point season.

news.headline: Stevenson fully healthy entering camp
news.detail: Per coach press conference, Stevenson had no injury limitations during OTAs and is expected to be the clear starter Week 1.

news.headline: Patriots commit to Stevenson as featured back
news.detail: Coaching staff confirmed Stevenson will handle the bulk of carries and remain the primary receiving back in Drake Maye's offense.
